# Licensing Standards

## License: FSL-1.1-ALv2

All HyperI projects use **FSL-1.1-ALv2**. Copyright: `(c) YYYY HYPERI PTY LIMITED`.

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| SPDX | `FSL-1.1-ALv2` |
| Commercial Use | Requires commercial license |
| Internal/Self-hosted | Permitted without license |
| Future Open Source | Apache 2.0 after 2 years |
| Licensor | HYPERI PTY LIMITED (ABN 31 622 581 748) |
| Commercial contact | sales@hyperi.com.au |

## Source of Truth

Templates live in `hyperi-licensing/github-template/` (private repo). **Never edit LICENSE in individual repos.**

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `LICENSE` | FSL-1.1-ALv2 with Australian law notice |
| `COMMERCIAL.md` | Commercial licensing rules |
| `CONTRIBUTING.md` | DCO, Conventional Commits |
| `SECURITY.md` | Vulnerability disclosure |

## Setup

```bash
ci/attach.sh --init licensing
# Or manually:
cp ci/templates/licensing/{LICENSE,COMMERCIAL.md,CONTRIBUTING.md,SECURITY.md} .
```

## Project Config

| ❌ Don't | ✅ Do |
|----------|-------|
| Invent custom LICENSE files | `ci/attach.sh --init licensing` |
| `license = "MIT"` | `license = "FSL-1.1-ALv2"` (Cargo.toml) |
| `license = "MIT"` | `license = { text = "FSL-1.1-ALv2" }` (pyproject.toml) |
| `"license": "MIT"` | `"license": "SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE"` (package.json) |
| Go: license field | Include `LICENSE` file in repo root |

## Commercial License Required vs Not

**Required:** SaaS/PaaS to third parties, embedding in commercial products, reselling/white-labelling, intra-group hosting.

**Not required:** Internal use, self-hosting, non-commercial education/research, professional services helping others deploy.

## Third-Party Dependency Licenses

| Status | Licenses |
|--------|----------|
| ✅ Always OK | MIT, BSD-2-Clause, BSD-3-Clause, ISC, Apache-2.0, Unlicense, CC0, 0BSD |
| ⚠️ Conditional | MPL-2.0 (don't modify MPL files), LGPL (dynamic linking only, avoid in Go) |
| ❌ Never | GPL, AGPL, SSPL, BSL, no-license |

### CI License Audit Commands

```bash
cargo deny check licenses          # Rust
pip-licenses --fail-on="GPL;AGPL"  # Python
npx license-checker --failOn "GPL;AGPL"  # Node.js
go-licenses check ./...            # Go
```

## Maintenance Flow

1. Edit in `hyperi-licensing/github-template/`
2. `cp hyperi-licensing/github-template/* ci/templates/licensing/`
3. Commit/push both repos
4. Projects update on next `ci/attach.sh --init licensing`

## AI Rules

- Default to FSL-1.1-ALv2 for all new projects
- Always use `ci/attach.sh --init licensing` — never create custom LICENSE files
- Before adding any dependency: check license → reject GPL/AGPL/SSPL/no-license → proceed if permissive
